title: 'Ownan #0209
definition:
Onan = "strong"

 1) second son of Judah, slain by God for not fulfilling the
    levitical requirement to beget a child with the wife
    of a dead, childless brother
nasbUsage:
Definition: Onan = "strong"

 1) second son of Judah, slain by God for not fulfilling the
    levitical requirement to beget a child with the wife
    of a dead, childless brother

    NASB:  vigorous, a son of Judah
